## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible or framework-visible behavior it affects.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior, public API, package graph, runtime semantics, or workflow changed.
- [ ] `dotnet format` checks pass where relevant.
- [ ] `dotnet build` / `dotnet test` pass where relevant.
- [ ] Generated and reflection paths remain in parity where both support the same scenario.

## Risk

Call out compatibility, package graph, cancellation, retry, state consistency, diagnostics, or generated-code risks.
